# [EN-03] CAP-BOOST (Capacitive Decoupling Burst) — land γ-side RTL

> Plan ID `EN-03` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

🟡 **Witness-only.** `crates/cap-boost-witness/` pins the parameter
band (`ΔC = C_dec_base · γ³ ≈ 0.81 pF` at `C_dec_base = 100 pF`;
di/dt margin band [4 %, 10 %]; droop band [2 %, 8 %]; cap area
uplift ≤ 50 bps under R18 LAYER-FROZEN; `f_clk` impact ≤ 200 bps).
**No `src/cap_boost_*.v` exists in this repo today.**

## Plan

1. Land `src/cap_boost_rail.v` matching the witness band and the
   existing RTL header convention.
2. Add `test/tb_cap_boost_rail.v` covering: `ΔC` step, droop-band
   assertion, di/dt-margin-band assertion, cap-area-uplift assertion
   (≤ 50 bps), `f_clk` impact assertion (≤ 200 bps).
3. Optionally add `src/triple_deck_ctrl.v` to sequence
   `0xF1 → 0xF2 → 0xF3` together with the existing
   `src/fbb_active_path.v` (depends on EN-02 landing first).

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `src/cap_boost_rail.v` lands and elaborates clean.
- [ ] `test/tb_cap_boost_rail.v` PASSES under `iverilog`.
- [ ] R-SI-1 still PASS.
- [ ] Anchor regression: `sim/tb_canonical.v` still 3 PASS, 0 FAIL.
- [ ] [`TRIPLE_DECK_STATUS.md`](../../TRIPLE_DECK_STATUS.md) §2.3
      updated to flip CAP-BOOST from ❌ to ✅ in the RTL gate.

## R5 honesty

- Landing this module also **changes the GDS hash**. Coordinate with
  the shuttle release.
- The `ΔC ≈ 0.81 pF`, `+6 %` di/dt margin, `−4 %` droop figures come
  from `crates/cap-boost-witness/` modelling, **not** measurement.
- The TOPS-per-watt envelope-add (`1083 → 1091` in the crate doc) is
  a **projection** derived from φ⁻ⁿ-based modelling; it is **not**
  claimed as a γ-side measured result by closing this issue.
